1.The USB receiver is placed in the bottom of the mouse;Take out the USB receiver, then plug the USB into computer; Prepare 1* AA battery when you first use it(not included);The mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If it can not go to paring mode,the mouse need to pair with the USB again:Turn off the Switch,pull down the USB receiver from computer, then plug in the USB and turn on the mouse switch again,get the mouse colse distance with the USB receiver.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.
Package Included:
1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction

reviews.title: Nice looking but.....
reviews.text:
This mouse looks like the picture. the USB neatly stores into the bottom of the car.
What I didn't like about it is:
1. One of the wheels has rough edges and where the battery fits is also a rough edge. They catch on my mouse pad, a lot.
Only one of the wheels move. If they all did, I think it would make the mouse smoother when you are working with it.
I didn't use it in time to return it so I am stuck with it. I think I may have to try and file it down.

I do like the case and keyboard it sits up fine for me with the case. Overall it is a good deal for this price if you're looking for something to write with or watch shows on.

reviews.title: Great Mouse
reviews.text:
I enjoy this mouse a lot, I like that it is Bluetooth. I mainly got it because I love the colors and it matches everything else in my room. But I found it works very well so far I have had it for a couple weeks now I work from home so it's a good addition to an at-home office set up!

There has been one time where I had to take out the battery and reinsert it because it was lagging a bit but I have had no other problems other than that!

reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
reviews.text: I was on the hunt for a purple mouse but wanted it to be quite muted. This is literally perfect! The wheel and the mouse have all held up perfectly and the sleep mode is great to not waste the batteries!

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I really like the size of this mouse, it works great. My only qualm about this that there isn't an on and off switch. It does goes to sleep but if a button is pushed it wakes up. I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.title: Cute and affordable

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

reviews.title: It's a mouse, it works.
reviews.text:
When purchasing a bluetooth mouse, or any bluetooth device, an important factor is how well it connects and how well it STAYS connected. After all this time, the industry still can’t make up its mind about how bluetooth works:
- Microsoft with their mouse and Sony with their controller that pair without the need of a code (which Android’s bluetooth stack doesn’t support).
- Mice and keyboards that will not reconnect after it wakes from sleep mode.
- To this day, bluetooth devices still can’t wake a computer from suspend state.
So when I get a simple bluetooth mouse for a good price, and it actually works as expected, I was happy.

For my review, I’m comparing the Bornd mouse to the [[ASIN:B006428K7I Motorola 89519N Bluetooth Mouse]] which I got in a set that included the [[ASIN:B004L9MBH6 Motorola Wireless Keyboard for Motorola ATRIX and XOOM (Motorola Retail Packaging)]].

With the Motorola mouse, its frequency somehow conflicts with the Motorola keyboard, resulting in sticky keys, as in “I’m having a good daaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaay”. Conversely, the keyboard interferes with the mouse where the computer would actually lose connection with the mouse for a few seconds after typing, or lose connection completely.

What I liked about the Bornd:
- Pairing was simple using the button at the bottom of the mouse.
- Operating distance is about 5 feet, but this may be because of my computer’s bluetooth antenna
- Takes a single AA battery which lasts over a month of moderate use (2 hours per day)
- Mouse movement is good. No need to adjust mouse speed in the control panel.
- Accuracy is good. Editing images using Pixlr.com, I’m able to select precisely the parts of the image I need.

What gave me trouble with the Bornd:
- When you first put your hand on this mouse, you will not feel that it is very well built. The plastic is completely smooth and the mouse wheel seems to rattle when you shake it. I got used to it after a few minutes, though.
- The mouse reconnects with the computer most of the time, but sometimes it was necessary to turn the mouse off and on again after the computer reboots or if the computer was out of range for an extended period of time.
- Lately, I’ve been experiencing double-clicks when I click on the left mouse button once. I’m usually able to fix this by getting angry and slamming the mouse down a couple of times. This may indicate a build quality issue with this mouse.

In my specific case, the Bournd did not interfere with my Motorola keyboard at all and it seems the sticky key occurs only when the batteries on the keyboard runs low.

reviews.title: I really do "love it".
reviews.text: I am using this device with an Asus Transformer Book T100TA touch screen notebook I recently purchased.  The device was recognized and connected to the notebook with no unusual delays or difficulties.  it works well with the PC as I recline in my easy-chair, using small motions upon the arm of the chair and allowing me to navigate through email and web browsing and to play games.  It is a nice compliment to the available on-screen gesture controls of the computer, especially for a die-hard convert from Windows XP and Windows 7 operating systems.

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: Flawless Bluetooth connectivity with Mac
reviews.text: My Logitech M310 (been using them for 10-15 years) could not connect properly with my USB-C/Thunderbolt MacBookPro, using their USB dongle, thru a USB adapter. Scroll wheel would NOT work, and Logitech tech support said they would not update drivers. 'Don't use an adapter.' But they aren't aware that new Macs don't have old-school USB ports? Anyone else have this problem?! Anyway... this Seenda connects directly with Bluetooth, and connects instantly. If it sleeps (after a few hours?) it wakes and re-connects with one click, in less than a second. I charged the battery when I bought it a few weeks ago, and forgot that I might need to charge it again one day. Still going. Downsides: it is much smaller and lighter than I am used to (the M310 is easily twice as thick/tall) so I am getting used to that. Took awhile to find the right DPI/resolution/speed (and the button to change that is in a precarious, easy-to-hit-by-mistake position. Overall a great recommend.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

【Universal Compatibility】This wireless mouse works with Computer PC Notebook Laptop tablet with USB port, running on Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, 8,10,11, Mac OS X 10.4 , Chromebook, PS4, PS5,Xbox and more【Notice: If your laptop only have a Type C port, you will need a USB to Type C adaptor to connect it】

【Type C Recharging & Independent ON/OFF Switch】This seenda wireless mouse uses 650mAh rechargeable battery and a single charge would last for a whole week. While the intelligent auto sleep function and on/off switch help you go further between charges

【Ultra Quiet Click】We know your demands of a quiet mouse, so we have reduced the clicking and scrolling noise to up to 90% while you enjoy the same click feel. Perfect for working at home, library, students dormitory,office or even traveling. Thanks to the great ergonomic design, this mouse fits comfortably in your hand, prevent any possible wrist pain

【Driver-Free &3 Adjustable DPI】Comes with a small USB nano receiver(stored in the back of mouse), just plug it into your computer and you are ready to go. 3 Adjustable DPI levels (800/1200/1600) ,set your own cursor speed

reviews.title: Works really well so far
reviews.text: My old mouse broke so I ordered something new that I have never tried. Set up was very easy. Just plug in the little USB port wireless device that is included and the mouse already seemed to be at least partially charged so away I went immediately without issue. It comes with some very nice colors that are changeable with a push button on the bottom. I like the moving multiple colors myself. Very nice unit for the price.

title: COCNI Slim Silent Wireless Mouse, Portable 2.4GHz Wireless Computer Mouse with 3 Adjustable DPI and USB Receiver, Optical Office Wireless Mouse for Laptop, Desktop, MacBook, Chromebook, PC
features: 【Stable 2.4GHz Wireless Connection, Plug & Play】2.4GHz wireless technology provides stronger anti-interference capability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection. Therefore, you do not need to worry about the interference of other devices around the COCNI wireless mouse. When you want to use the wireless mouse, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop. It does not require any drivers to be installed.

【Suitable for Various Object Surfaces】The wireless mouse has three adjustable DPIs (800, 1200, 1600). You can change the sensitivity of the cursor according to your needs, so that you can track accurately, smoothly and accurately on various object surfaces. Even without a mouse pad, this wireless mouse will not affect daily use. It allows you to use your laptop to work easily in an emergency or when you have not prepared the mouse pad in advance.

【Energy Saving and Longer Service Life】This COCNI wireless mouse is powered by two AAA batteries (not included in the package), which can maintain a battery life of more than 12 months. The intelligent sleep mode of the laptop wireless mouse can better extend the service life of the battery, and save time and money by reducing battery replacement. It will automatically enter the sleep mode after 6 minutes, without any operation, just click any button to activate the wireless mouse.

【Silent Click, Comfortable Feel】The design of the mute button can reduce the noise by 90%, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for offices, conference rooms, cafes, libraries and bedrooms, helping you concentrate on your work and study without disturbing others except you. The slim shape, anti sweat, anti fingerprint and skin friendly surface of the wireless mouse provide maximum comfort and support. Robust rollers ensure that your hands do not slip when rolling. This wireless mouse has been designed by thousands of people. It is ergonomic and allows you to use the mouse at a high frequency without causing your fingers to feel sore.

【Strong Compatibility, Slim Portable Size】This COCNI wireless mouse is used in various computer devices (Macbook, Laptop, Desktop etc.) and various computer operating systems (MacOS, Win xp/7/8/10, Linux etc.). The ultra-thin design allows the cordless mouse to be carried anywhere at any time, because it can be easily placed in a laptop box or bag. Light and compact, it is very suitable for business trip or travel.

【High Quality Customer Service】We provide 24-hour customer service. For any questions about this wireless mouse, please feel free to contact us through your order page. If you are not satisfied with our wireless mouse, we will give you a full refund.Our service tenet is to "let customers buy at ease, use at ease, and have no worries after sales." Please do not hesitate to choose us!

title: INPHIC Wireless Mouse for Laptop, 2.4G Slim Mouse 700mAh Rechargeable, Noiseless Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI Optical Cordless Mouse for MacBook, Chromebook, PC, Laptop-Black
features: ✔ Rechargable Wireless Mouse: Built-in high quality rechargeble 700mAh battery, can last up to 500hours use after a single full charged. The laptop wireless mouse will enter into sleep mode automatically after 3 minutes of inactivity to save power, and it will be activated again by gently moved

✔ 2.4GHz Wireless Data Transfer: 2.4G Wireless technology support stable connection and precise track with working distance of up to 10 meters. Play and Plug. 3 DPI switches (1000, 1200, 1600) change the speed of the mouse freely

✔ Silent and Durable Clicking: Mute design with advanced sensor provides noiseless clicks, perfect for public place like libraries, home, offices and any other occasions where you do not want to disturb others.(Please note: only the left and right main keys support silent click.)

✔ Ultra Slim and Comfortable Design: Compared to similar products on the market, our wireless laptop mouse is much lighter and thinner. It can easily be stored in your laptop bag, which is perfect for travel. Please note: the Nano-receiver is stored inside the back of the mouse

✔ Wide Compatibility and Worry-free Warranty: Well compatible with Windows Vista and Mac OS. Backed by 45-day money back,12-month replacement and lifetime easy-to-reach technical support and customer service

reviews.title: No instructions on box but, easy
reviews.text: Perfect and does the job. I had to google the instructions. But it’s super easy set up. The little usb part that needs to plug into your laptop to talk to the mouse, is plugged into the under side of the mouse, simply pull out and stick into the laptop, switch the button on the mouse (on bottom) to on, and as long as charged up, it’s ready to go. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!
